content.section: Assassin is a tier 3 tank that can be selected upon reaching level 30 using "Sniper", and at level 45, can be upgraded into "Ranger" or "Stalker".

- With it's further increased FOV, hide outside other player's FOV and ambush them without giving time to react.
- Change your position to get more chances at clear shots and for your enemies to be unsure on your whereabouts.
- Due to its low DPS Assassin isn't good at close range, avoid getting into combat with tanks.
- Players should also use their increased Field of View to locate players and pick their battles.
- Keep players on the edge of your screen. When they come towards you, retreat and when they retreat, move towards them.

- Despite being added to the game after the Overseer, it's upgrade background is blue, which is for the first upgrade of a tank, while Overseer's is green.
- In one of the oldest versions of the game, Assassin used to upgrade into itself at level 45, with no added benefits.
